name: GPT-5.1
tagline: Warmer, more conversational and customizable GPT-5.
metaDescription: GPT-5.1 (OpenAI), released 2025-11-12 — part of the GPT (Flagship / Thinking) line. Warmer, more conversational and customizable GPT-5.
overview: GPT-5.1 is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the GPT (Flagship / Thinking) line. Released 2025-11-12. OpenAI's flagship reasoning model line for complex agentic coding, tool use, and professional work.
What's notable in this version: Warmer, more conversational and customizable GPT-5.
